mapper.select: SELECT p.*, c.name AS category_name, s.id AS sku_id, s.product_id AS sku_product_id, s.spec_name AS sku_spec_name, s.price AS sku_price, s.member_price AS sku_member_price, s.stock AS sku_stock, s.sort AS sku_sort, s.create_time AS sku_create_time, s.update_time AS sku_update_time FROM product p LEFT JOIN category c ON p.category_id = c.id LEFT JOIN sku s ON p.id = s.product_id WHERE p.id = #{id} ORDER BY s.sort ASC, s.id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO product (category_id, name, description, cover_img, type, status, support_delivery, sort) VALUES (#{categoryId}, #{name}, #{description}, #{coverImg}, #{type}, #{status}, #{supportDelivery}, #{sort})
mapper.update: UPDATE product SET category_id = #{categoryId}, name = #{name}, description = #{description}, cover_img = #{coverImg}, type = #{type}, support_delivery = #{supportDelivery}, sort = #{sort} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE product SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM order_item WHERE product_id = #{id}
